prompt.description: User-facing character description (free text, any language)

name.description: Optional human-readable character name; auto-derived from prompt when omitted

charId.description: Existing charId to overwrite; new id auto-derived when omitted

model.description: Override primary model; pipeline still falls back when the chosen one errors

refImageBase64.description: Optional reference image (base64, sans data: prefix); only respected by image-edit-capable models
